complete_product_scope: every meaningful Product SOT capability, operation, proof and release requirement
complete_product_non_goals: anything explicitly marked out of scope by the Product SOT

work_units.objective: Deliver one safe execution slice without reducing the Product SOT scope.
scope_in: the named Product SOT requirement refs
verification: run the checks named by the work unit
work_units.expected_result: PASS or explicit BLOCK with owner

slice_boundaries: each slice is reversible and does not redefine product scope
risk_map: scope shrinkage is blocked by the full Product SOT coverage map
complete_product_done_criteria: all SOT requirements are done, blocked, deferred with owner, or out of scope
slice_done_criteria: slice verification passes and evidence refs are attached
drift_check: Refresh this plan when Product SOT, method, architecture, capability packs or landed slices change.
stop_conditions: missing promotion ladder for production intent
reconciliation_policy: Mark work units todo, ready, blocked, done, rejected, superseded or needs_refresh; never treat a done slice as whole-product completion.
